contextBlurb: California enacted the Digital Financial Assets Law (DFAL) in 2023, establishing a licensing regime for digital financial asset businesses administered by the DFPI. The law covers stablecoin issuers and exchanges, with licensing requirements taking effect July 1, 2025.

legislation.title: Digital Financial Assets Law (DFAL)
legislation.summary: Establishes a licensing regime for digital financial asset businesses in California, including stablecoin issuers and exchanges, administered by the Department of Financial Protection and Innovation (DFPI). Licensing requirements took effect July 1, 2025.
